retry_reason: This is a release callback — it is invoked only when the refcount reaches zero; there is no failure path and no retry concept.
contract_summary: Release wrapper for as102_dev_t objects. Called automatically by kref_put when the kref reference count drops to zero, indicating that no more references exist. It decrements the USB device reference via usb_put_dev and frees the as102_dev_t allocation. This function must never be called directly; after execution, the object is freed and must not be accessed. The caller must ensure that all prior references have been released before the final kref_put triggers this callback.
